channel.title: PrimitiveKit – Overlay
channel.description: Recent content in Overlay on PrimitiveKit

item.title: Drawer
item.description:
Drawer

Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.

Import 

import { DrawerComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-drawer>Content</pk-drawer>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Drawer component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-drawer [style]="{
 '--drawer-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--drawer-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-drawer>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --drawer-mask-background
  • --drawer-mask-z-index
  • --drawer-mask-opacity
  • --drawer-mask-backdrop-filter
  • --drawer-transition-duration
  • --drawer-transition-timing
  • --open
  • --drawer-z-index
  • --drawer-background
  • --drawer-box-shadow
  • … and 58 more

Accessibility

The Drawer component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.
  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Drawer
item.description:
Drawer

Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.

Import 

import { Drawer } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Drawer>Content</Drawer>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Drawer component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Drawer style={{
'--drawer-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--drawer-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Drawer>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --drawer-mask-background
  • --drawer-mask-z-index
  • --drawer-mask-opacity
  • --drawer-mask-backdrop-filter
  • --drawer-transition-duration
  • --drawer-transition-timing
  • --open
  • --drawer-z-index
  • --drawer-background
  • --drawer-box-shadow
  • … and 58 more

Accessibility

The Drawer component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.
  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Drawer
item.description:
Drawer

Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.

Import 

import Drawer from '@primitivekit/svelte/Drawer.svelte';

Basic Usage 

<Drawer>Content</Drawer>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Drawer component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Drawer style={{
 '--drawer-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--drawer-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Drawer>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --drawer-mask-background
  • --drawer-mask-z-index
  • --drawer-mask-opacity
  • --drawer-mask-backdrop-filter
  • --drawer-transition-duration
  • --drawer-transition-timing
  • --open
  • --drawer-z-index
  • --drawer-background
  • --drawer-box-shadow
  • … and 58 more

Accessibility

The Drawer component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.
  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Drawer
item.description:
Drawer

Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.

Import 

import { Drawer } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const drawer = new Drawer({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(drawer.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Drawer component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const drawer = new Drawer({
 style: {
 '--drawer-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--drawer-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --drawer-mask-background
  • --drawer-mask-z-index
  • --drawer-mask-opacity
  • --drawer-mask-backdrop-filter
  • --drawer-transition-duration
  • --drawer-transition-timing
  • --open
  • --drawer-z-index
  • --drawer-background
  • --drawer-box-shadow
  • … and 58 more

Accessibility

The Drawer component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.
  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Drawer
item.description:
Drawer

Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.

Import 

import { Drawer } from '@primitivekit/vue';

Basic Usage 

<Drawer>Content</Drawer>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Drawer component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Drawer style={{
 '--drawer-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--drawer-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Drawer>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --drawer-mask-background
  • --drawer-mask-z-index
  • --drawer-mask-opacity
  • --drawer-mask-backdrop-filter
  • --drawer-transition-duration
  • --drawer-transition-timing
  • --open
  • --drawer-z-index
  • --drawer-background
  • --drawer-box-shadow
  • … and 58 more

Accessibility

The Drawer component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.
  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Dropdown
item.description:
Dropdown

Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

Import 

import { DropdownComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-dropdown>Content</pk-dropdown>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Dropdown component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-dropdown [style]="{
 '--dropdown-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--dropdown-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-dropdown>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --dropdown-bg-color
  • --dropdown-border-radius
  • --dropdown-border-width
  • --dropdown-border-color
  • --dropdown-box-shadow
  • --dropdown-padding-top
  • --dropdown-padding-y
  • --dropdown-padding-right
  • --dropdown-padding-x
  • --dropdown-padding-bottom
  • … and 42 more

Accessibility

The Dropdown component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Dropdown
item.description:
Dropdown

Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

Import 

import { Dropdown } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Dropdown>Content</Dropdown>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Dropdown component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Dropdown style={{
'--dropdown-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--dropdown-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Dropdown>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --dropdown-bg-color
  • --dropdown-border-radius
  • --dropdown-border-width
  • --dropdown-border-color
  • --dropdown-box-shadow
  • --dropdown-padding-top
  • --dropdown-padding-y
  • --dropdown-padding-right
  • --dropdown-padding-x
  • --dropdown-padding-bottom
  • … and 42 more

Accessibility

The Dropdown component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Dropdown
item.description:
Dropdown

Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

Import 

import Dropdown from '@primitivekit/svelte/Dropdown.svelte';

Basic Usage 

<Dropdown>Content</Dropdown>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Dropdown component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Dropdown style={{
 '--dropdown-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--dropdown-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Dropdown>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --dropdown-bg-color
  • --dropdown-border-radius
  • --dropdown-border-width
  • --dropdown-border-color
  • --dropdown-box-shadow
  • --dropdown-padding-top
  • --dropdown-padding-y
  • --dropdown-padding-right
  • --dropdown-padding-x
  • --dropdown-padding-bottom
  • … and 42 more

Accessibility

The Dropdown component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.

item.title: Dropdown
item.description:
Dropdown

Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

Import 

import { Dropdown } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const dropdown = new Dropdown({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(dropdown.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Dropdown component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const dropdown = new Dropdown({
 style: {
 '--dropdown-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--dropdown-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --dropdown-bg-color
  • --dropdown-border-radius
  • --dropdown-border-width
  • --dropdown-border-color
  • --dropdown-box-shadow
  • --dropdown-padding-top
  • --dropdown-padding-y
  • --dropdown-padding-right
  • --dropdown-padding-x
  • --dropdown-padding-bottom
  • … and 42 more

Accessibility

The Dropdown component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Dropdown
item.description:
Dropdown

Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

Import 

import { Dropdown } from '@primitivekit/vue';

Basic Usage 

<Dropdown>Content</Dropdown>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Dropdown component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Dropdown style={{
 '--dropdown-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--dropdown-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Dropdown>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --dropdown-bg-color
  • --dropdown-border-radius
  • --dropdown-border-width
  • --dropdown-border-color
  • --dropdown-box-shadow
  • --dropdown-padding-top
  • --dropdown-padding-y
  • --dropdown-padding-right
  • --dropdown-padding-x
  • --dropdown-padding-bottom
  • … and 42 more

The Dropdown component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.

item.title: Modal
item.description:
Modal

Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.

Import 

import { ModalComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-modal>Content</pk-modal>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Modal component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-modal [style]="{
 '--modal-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--modal-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-modal>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --modal-overlay-bg-color
  • --modal-overlay-opacity
  • --modal-overlay-backdrop-filter
  • --modal-overlay-z-index
  • --modal-overlay-animation-duration
  • --modal-overlay-animation-timing
  • --modal-bg-color
  • --modal-color
  • --modal-border-radius
  • --modal-border-width
  • … and 57 more

Accessibility

The Modal component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.
  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Modal
item.description:
Modal

Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.

Import 

import { Modal } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Modal>Content</Modal>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Modal component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Modal style={{
'--modal-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--modal-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Modal>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --modal-overlay-bg-color
  • --modal-overlay-opacity
  • --modal-overlay-backdrop-filter
  • --modal-overlay-z-index
  • --modal-overlay-animation-duration
  • --modal-overlay-animation-timing
  • --modal-bg-color
  • --modal-color
  • --modal-border-radius
  • --modal-border-width
  • … and 57 more

Accessibility

The Modal component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.
  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

item.title: Modal
item.description:
Modal

Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.

Import 

import Modal from '@primitivekit/svelte/Modal.svelte';

Basic Usage 

<Modal>Content</Modal>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Modal component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Modal style={{
 '--modal-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--modal-text-color': '#ffffff'

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --modal-overlay-bg-color
  • --modal-overlay-opacity
  • --modal-overlay-backdrop-filter

  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

item.title: Modal
item.description:
Modal

Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.

Import 

import { Modal } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const modal = new Modal({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(modal.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Modal component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const modal = new Modal({
 style: {
 '--modal-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--modal-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --modal-overlay-bg-color
  • --modal-overlay-opacity
  • --modal-overlay-backdrop-filter
  • --modal-overlay-z-index
  • --modal-overlay-animation-duration
  • --modal-overlay-animation-timing
  • --modal-bg-color
  • --modal-color
  • --modal-border-radius
  • --modal-border-width
  • … and 57 more

Accessibility

The Modal component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.
  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.description:
Modal

Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.

Import

item.title: Popover
item.description:
Popover

Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.

Import 

import { PopoverComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-popover>Content</pk-popover>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Popover component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-popover [style]="{
 '--popover-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--popover-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-popover>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --popover-bg-color
  • --popover-color
  • --popover-border-radius
  • --popover-border-width
  • --popover-border-color
  • --popover-box-shadow
  • --popover-padding-top
  • --popover-padding-y
  • --popover-padding-right
  • --popover-padding-x
  • … and 61 more

Accessibility

The Popover component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Popover
item.description:
Popover

Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.

Import 

import { Popover } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Popover>Content</Popover>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Popover component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Popover style={{
'--popover-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--popover-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Popover>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --popover-bg-color
  • --popover-color
  • --popover-border-radius
  • --popover-border-width
  • --popover-border-color
  • --popover-box-shadow
  • --popover-padding-top
  • --popover-padding-y
  • --popover-padding-right
  • --popover-padding-x
  • … and 61 more

Accessibility

The Popover component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

item.title: Popover
item.description:
Popover

Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.

Import 

import Popover from '@primitivekit/svelte/Popover.svelte';

Basic Usage 

<Popover>Content</Popover>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Popover component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Popover style={{
 '--popover-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--popover-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Popover>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --popover-bg-color
  • --popover-color
  • --popover-border-radius
  • --popover-border-width

  • --popover-box-shadow
  • --popover-padding-top
  • --popover-padding-y
  • --popover-padding-right
  • --popover-padding-x
  • … and 61 more

Accessibility

The Popover component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

item.title: Popover
item.description:
Popover

Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.

Import 

import { Popover } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const popover = new Popover({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(popover.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Popover component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const popover = new Popover({
 style: {
 '--popover-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--popover-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --popover-bg-color
  • --popover-color
  • --popover-border-radius
  • --popover-border-width
  • --popover-border-color
  • --popover-box-shadow
  • --popover-padding-top
  • --popover-padding-y
  • --popover-padding-right
  • --popover-padding-x
  • … and 61 more

Accessibility

The Popover component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Popover
item.description:
Popover

Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.

Import 

import { Popover } from '@primitivekit/vue';

Basic Usage 

<Popover>Content</Popover>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Popover component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Popover style={{
 '--popover-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--popover-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Popover>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --popover-bg-color
  • --popover-color
  • --popover-border-radius
  • --popover-border-width
  • --popover-border-color
  • --popover-box-shadow
  • --popover-padding-top
  • --popover-padding-y
  • --popover-padding-right
  • --popover-padding-x
  • … and 61 more

Accessibility

The Popover component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
  • Tooltip - Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

item.title: Tooltip
item.description:
Tooltip

Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.

Import 

import { TooltipComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-tooltip>Content</pk-tooltip>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Tooltip component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-tooltip [style]="{
 '--tooltip-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--tooltip-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-tooltip>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --tooltip-bg-color
  • --tooltip-color
  • --tooltip-border-radius
  • --tooltip-border-width
  • --tooltip-border-color
  • --tooltip-box-shadow
  • --tooltip-padding-top
  • --tooltip-padding-y
  • --tooltip-padding-right
  • --tooltip-padding-x
  • … and 21 more

Accessibility

The Tooltip component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

| Escape | Close component |

Related Components

  • Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
  • Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
  • Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.
  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Tooltip
item.description:
Tooltip

Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.

Import 

import { Tooltip } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Tooltip>Content</Tooltip>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Tooltip component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Tooltip style={{
'--tooltip-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--tooltip-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Tooltip>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --tooltip-bg-color
  • --tooltip-color
  • --tooltip-border-radius
  • --tooltip-border-width
  • --tooltip-border-color
  • --tooltip-box-shadow
  • --tooltip-padding-top
  • --tooltip-padding-y
  • --tooltip-padding-right
  • --tooltip-padding-x
  • … and 21 more

Accessibility

The Tooltip component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action

| Escape | Close component |

  • Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
  • Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction.
  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.

item.title: Tooltip
item.description:
Tooltip

Overlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.

Import 

import { Tooltip } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const tooltip = new Tooltip({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(tooltip.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Tooltip component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const tooltip = new Tooltip({
 style: {
 '--tooltip-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--tooltip-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --tooltip-bg-color
  • --tooltip-color
  • --tooltip-border-radius
  • --tooltip-border-width
  • --tooltip-border-color
  • --tooltip-box-shadow
  • --tooltip-padding-top
  • --tooltip-padding-y
  • --tooltip-padding-right
  • --tooltip-padding-x
  • … and 21 more

The Tooltip component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

  • Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.
